description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the mysql Docker image for the job and a mysql service, sets MYSQL_DATABASE to hello_world_test and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD to mysql. Define a job named connect (default stage) that runs the shell command: echo "SELECT 'OK';" | mysql --user=root --password="$MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD" --host=mysql "$MYSQL_DATABASE". No caches, artifacts, or rules are defined, so the job runs on every pipeline.
